pattern: Each value collapses to a ten-bit digit mask, turning every subtree into a disjoint-mask knapsack whose best total is found by a 1024-state DP.
hints: A value can only ever be chosen if its own digits are already distinct; otherwise it poisons any subset it joins.
Represent each usable value by the set of digits it occupies; a good subset is a collection of pairwise digit-disjoint masks.
For each subtree run a DP over the 1024 possible digit sets, picking the maximum-sum disjoint collection, then total those maxima modulo 1e9+7.

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 40))
    par = [-1]
    for i in range(1, n):
        par.append(rng.randrange(0, i))
    vals = [rng.randrange(1, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [vals, par]
stress.note: small values to keep masks varied; valid parent array by construction

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 25))
    par = [-1]
    for i in range(1, n):
        par.append(i - 1)
    vals = [rng.randrange(1, 10**6) for _ in range(n)]
    return [vals, par]
